title: Our Services
subtitle: Tailored digital solutions for your business
intro: From idea to implementation, we support you in creating high-performance, secure and scalable digital solutions.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Solutions adapted to your needs, developed with expertise and passion.

items.title: Web Development & Applications
items.shortDescription: Modern and high-performance websites and applications
items.description: We create custom websites and applications, optimized for performance and user experience. From showcase sites to complex business applications, we master the entire development chain.

items.title: Artificial Intelligence & Automation for SMEs
items.shortDescription: Save time with AI and automation
items.description: Free your teams from repetitive tasks with intelligent automation. We integrate secure and personalized AI solutions into your processes, with private hosting in Switzerland guaranteeing the confidentiality of your data.
features: Automated repetitive tasks (emails, data entry, reports)
Intelligent workflows connected to your tools
Integration of AI into your existing tools

items.title: Secure Solutions & Infrastructure
items.description: We design and implement robust and secure infrastructures, hosted in Switzerland. Guaranteed GDPR compliance and optimal data protection.

items.title: UX/UI Design
items.description: We create elegant and intuitive interfaces that place the user at the heart of the experience. Design system, prototyping and user testing to guarantee an optimal experience.

items.title: Maintenance & Support
items.description: We ensure the maintenance and evolution of your digital solutions over the long term. Responsive support, regular updates and personalized assistance.

items.title: Consulting & Digital Strategy
items.description: We support you in your digital transformation with strategic advice adapted to your objectives. Audit, technology choices and project roadmap.

process.title: Our Process
process.description: Structured and transparent support, from idea to deployment.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We analyze your needs, objectives and context to define the best approach together.

steps.title: Quote & Planning
steps.description: Detailed proposal with schedule, budget and project milestones. Complete transparency on costs and deadlines.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Interface design, technical architecture and mockup validation before development.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Iterative development with regular checkpoints. You follow progress in real time and validate at each stage.

steps.title: Testing & Validation
steps.description: Functional tests, performance tests and user tests to guarantee optimal quality.

steps.title: Deployment & Follow-up
steps.description: Launch, team training and ongoing support. We stay by your side after launch.

technologies.title: Technologies & Technical Stack
technologies.description: We use modern, reliable and high-performance technologies to create sustainable solutions.

packages.title: Our Packages
packages.description: Solutions tailored to your needs, at every stage of your digital transformation.

categories.title: Websites
categories.description: Professional showcase for your online presence

packages.name: Essential
packages.description: Get started quickly with the essentials

categories.title: Artificial Intelligence & Automation
categories.description: Automate and optimize your business processes

categories.title: Startup Launch Offer 🚀
categories.description: Specially designed for new companies in Switzerland

packages.name: Launch
packages.description: Professional website at reduced price to get started
packages.paymentOptions: Payable in 4 installments over 12 months (400 CHF x 4)
advantages: Professional website at reduced price to start your activity
Technical support during the critical first months
Possibility to upgrade to our higher packages
conditions: Company registered in Switzerland for less than 12 months
"Powered by Origin Studio" logo visible in footer (discreet but clickable)
Authorization to use the project as a portfolio reference

useCases.title: Use Cases
useCases.description: Some examples of projects we can create together

items.question: Do you want a chatbot that answers your customers 24/7?
items.answer: We create personalized AI assistants that understand your business and processes.

items.question: Do you need to analyze thousands of documents?
items.answer: Our AI solutions can extract, analyze and structure information automatically.

items.question: Is your current site slow and not secure?
items.answer: We modernize your infrastructure with high-performance and secure technologies.

items.question: Do you want to automate repetitive tasks?
items.answer: We develop custom automation solutions to save time.

items.question: What are your delivery times?
items.answer: Deadlines vary depending on project complexity. A showcase site typically takes 4-6 weeks, a web application 2-4 months. We establish a detailed schedule during the quote.

items.question: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
items.answer: Yes, we offer maintenance contracts including technical support, updates, monitoring and functional evolutions.

items.question: Do you work with limited budgets?
items.answer: We adapt to your budget by prioritizing essential features. Our Starter package starts at CHF 3,000 for a professional showcase site.

items.question: Where do you host projects?
items.answer: All our projects are hosted in Switzerland with environmentally friendly infrastructures compliant with the highest security standards (GDPR).

items.question: Can I modify my site myself after delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we integrate a content management system (CMS) adapted to your needs and train your teams on its use.

cta.title: Ready to start your project?
cta.description: Let's discuss your needs and find the solution that suits you together. First exchange without commitment.
